abilities.description:
K’Sante’s damage dealing abilities mark enemies to take more damage on his next hit. 
When All Out, K’Sante’s attacks, abilities, and passive deal more damage.
abilities.label: DAUNTLESS INSTINCT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE

abilities.description:
K’sante slams his weapon, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies in a line. On hit, grants a stack of Ntofo Strikes. At 2 stacks, K’Sante instead fires a shockwave that stuns and pulls enemies. 
When All Out, the cooldown is reduced.
abilities.label: NTOFO STRIKES

abilities.description:
K’Sante charges up, gaining displacement immunity and reduced damage. He then dashes forward, dealing damage, knocking back and stunning enemies. 
When All Out, cooldown is refreshed, deals additional damage, no longer knocks back or stuns, but also grants increased damage reduction and dash speed.
abilities.label: PATH MAKER

abilities.description:
K’Sante dashes and gains a shield. If he dashes to an ally, the dash distance is increased and both gain a shield. 
When All Out, cooldown is reduced and dash speed is increased.
abilities.label: FOOTWORK

abilities.description: K’Sante becomes unstoppable and splits his ntofos to know back an enemy. If the enemy collides with terrain, they are knocked through, taking additional damage. K’Sante, then dashes behind them and enters All Out. While All Out, K’Sante’s abilities are upgraded. He also gains Attack Speed, Armor Penetration, and Omnivamp, while losing some maximum Health, Armor, and Magic Resist.
abilities.label: ALL OUT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
